context: Tests whether the agent catches stale or incorrect advanced SpriteKit effects guidance.

checklist.name: Async atlas API correction
checklist.description: Replaces a withCheckedContinuation wrapper with current SpriteKit async preload APIs such as SKTextureAtlas.preloadTextureAtlasesNamed(_:) or preloadTextureAtlases(_:).

checklist.name: u_sprite_size correction
checklist.description: Does not list u_sprite_size as a SpriteKit-provided shader built-in and treats sprite size as an app-defined uniform or attribute if the shader needs it.

checklist.name: Actual shader symbols
checklist.description: Names relevant SpriteKit shader symbols or functions such as u_texture, u_time, v_tex_coord, v_color_mix, v_path_distance, or SKDefaultShading() where applicable.

checklist.name: Shader reuse
checklist.description: Recommends creating stable reusable SKShader instances and changing uniforms for variation instead of compiling or changing shader source for each enemy spawn.

checklist.name: Contact callback timing
checklist.description: Explains that SKPhysicsContactDelegate callbacks occur during physics simulation and that node/body/world mutations should be deferred out of didBegin(_:).
